en_title: 'Additional Packs Are Entirely Optional': Ubisoft Responds to Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Microtransactions Backlash, as $60 Game Arrives With $85 of DLC
cn_title: 育碧《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》遭遇微交易争议
subtitle: 附加包真的可选吗
opus_summary: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》因首日推出总价85美元(约合人民币577元)的可选内容而引发争议。育碧称60美元(约合人民币407元)标准版已包含完整体验，附加包不会影响通关。

paragraphs.en: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced has faced a stormy start on Steam, where the $60 game's collection of optional extras totals $85.
paragraphs.cn: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》在Steam上的开局并不顺利：这款售价60美元(约合人民币407元)的游戏，其可选额外内容总价达85美元(约合人民币577元)。

paragraphs.en: Despite positive reviews from critics, fans left scathing feedback on the game's Steam store page regarding the array of $10 cosmetic packs available on day one, in addition to a $5 map pack add-on.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管获得了评论家的好评，玩家仍在游戏Steam商店页面留下尖锐差评，矛头指向首日推出的多款10美元(约合人民币68元)外观包，以及额外的5美元(约合人民币34元)地图包。

paragraphs.en: None of these types of content are unusual for an Assassin's Creed game, though the sheer number available at launch, as well as their pricing, has drawn ire. So much so, that Ubisoft has now seen fit to respond — to remind players that such add-ons are not vital.
paragraphs.cn: 对《刺客信条》游戏而言，这些内容类型并不罕见，但首发时提供的数量及其价格引发了众怒。争议之大，甚至让育碧出面回应，提醒玩家这些附加内容并非必需。

paragraphs.en: "Come on Ubisoft you just couldn't hold yourself huh?!" wrote one player. "Releasing a 70 euro game and on the DAY of the release you slap us with 85 euros worth of DLC packs that are just not cosmetic but give you a gameplay advantage this is why piracy exist and I will be refunding!"
paragraphs.cn: 一名玩家写道：「育碧，你们就这么迫不及待吗？！发售一款70欧元(约合人民币542元)的游戏，却在发售当天甩出价值85欧元(约合人民币659元)的DLC包。这些包不只是外观，还能带来游戏优势——这就是盗版存在的原因，我要退款！」

paragraphs.en: "What's the point of getting the deluxe version when, immediately in game, there's $84.91 worth 'DLC' that you don't own," added another fan.
paragraphs.cn: 另一名玩家补充道：「既然进游戏后立刻就有价值84.91美元(约合人民币577元)的‘DLC’不属于你，买豪华版到底有什么意义？」

paragraphs.en: "Bought the Deluxe Edition, foolishly thinking I'd be buying the FULL game," added a third. "Here I was thinking Ubisoft had turned a new leaf, then WHAM, they hit you with over £75 worth of additional day 1 DLC."
paragraphs.cn: 第三名玩家说：「我买了豪华版，愚蠢地以为自己买的是完整游戏。我还以为育碧改过自新了，结果砰的一声，他们又用价值超过75英镑(约合人民币682元)的首日DLC砸了过来。」

paragraphs.en: DLC packs available at launch include the Master Assassin Character Pack, Master Assassin Naval Pack, Hellfire Character Pack, Hellfire Naval Pack, Sea Serpent Character Pack, Sea Serpent Naval Pack, Dragon Storm Character Pack, Dragon Storm Naval Pack and the Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced - Map Pack.
paragraphs.cn: 首发DLC包包括：大师刺客角色包、大师刺客海军包、地狱火角色包、地狱火海军包、海蛇角色包、海蛇海军包、龙之风暴角色包、龙之风暴海军包，以及《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》地图包。

paragraphs.en: Priced at $10 each, these contain either an additional costume for hero Edward Kenway or a new cosmetic look for your ship, the Jackdaw — except for the time-saving $5 map pack, which highlights all collectibles without you needing to discover their locations manually.
paragraphs.cn: 这些内容每包售价10美元(约合人民币68元)，提供主角Edward Kenway的新服装或船只「寒鸦号」的新外观；只有5美元(约合人民币34元)的省时地图包例外，它会标出所有收集品，无需玩家亲自寻找位置。

paragraphs.en: "We've seen your feedback since launch, and we're reading all of it," a Ubisoft community spokesperson said in a on Steam. "Thank you for caring this much about Black Flag Resynced. We want to be clear on one point: the standard edition is the full, complete experience. Every mission, every island, the full story and the complete world are all there, with nothing held back. The additional packs are entirely optional extras for players who want them, never a requirement to enjoy or complete the game. We'll keep listening as you play!"
paragraphs.cn: 育碧社区发言人在Steam上表示：「我们看到了你们自发售以来的反馈，也在阅读全部内容。感谢大家如此关心《黑旗 记忆重置》。有一点我们想说清楚：标准版就是完整体验。每个任务、每座岛屿、完整故事和完整世界都在其中，没有任何保留。附加包完全是供有需要的玩家选择的额外内容，从来不是享受或完成游戏的必需品。我们会继续倾听大家游玩时的声音！」

paragraphs.en: Microtransactions aside, Ubisoft's expanded and polished-up take on its pirate adventure classic has been praised for bringing the game up to modern standards. While its multiplayer and modern day portions have been cut, these have been replaced by additional missions and story scenes set in the Caribbean, while the ground-up remake has also brought notable visual upgrades.
paragraphs.cn: 抛开微交易不谈，育碧对这款海盗冒险经典的扩展和打磨，因让游戏达到现代标准而获得好评。虽然多人模式和现代部分被删去，但它们由设定在加勒比地区的额外任务与剧情场景取代；这款完全重制的作品也带来了明显的画面升级。

paragraphs.en: Sales-wise, the game is also performing well. Yesterday, Resynced smashed the franchise's Steam concurrent player record with a peak of around 100,000 — over a third more than the peak for feudal Japan blockbuster Assassin's Creed Shadows.
paragraphs.cn: 从销量表现来看，游戏同样不错。昨天，《记忆重置》的Steam同时在线人数峰值达到约10万，打破系列纪录，比以封建日本为背景的热门作品《刺客信条：影》的峰值高出三分之一以上。

paragraphs.en: "More than just a shinier version of the same game you remember, Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced brings what was already one of the best games in the series up to today’s standards," IGN wrote in our Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced review , rating the game 9/10.
paragraphs.cn: IGN在《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》评测中写道：「《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》不只是你记忆中那款游戏的精致版，它让系列中本就最出色的作品之一达到了今天的标准。」IGN为游戏打出9/10分。

paragraphs.en: Before you dive into the Golden Age of Piracy, check out our guides on things to do first and tips and tricks to help Edward Kenway's journey be a smooth one. As you explore the Caribbean, make sure you don't miss a single collectible , especially the shanties to keep you and your crew entertained on the high seas. Blow other ships to smithereens with our and save Reales for your next Jackdaw upgrade to be the mightiest pirate you can be.
paragraphs.cn: 在踏入海盗黄金时代前，可以先查看我们的入门指南和技巧，让Edward Kenway的旅程更加顺利。探索加勒比地区时，别漏掉任何收集品，尤其是能让你和船员在海上获得乐趣的船歌。用我们的攻略把其他船只轰成碎片，并攒下里亚尔，为下一次寒鸦号升级做准备，成为最强海盗。

translated_terms.Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》
